commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=978c2ac27370020d4bca84eb6ae3c7b604fa8d4e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces pond ACL JSON round-tripping with Tailscale HuJSON parsing/patching, updates doctor to use the shared parser, adds golden tests/docs, adds a direct HuJSON dependency, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main gives a high-confidence path: a commented HuJSON policy missing pond rows is standardized, decoded through JSON maps, and reserialized with json.MarshalIndent, which drops comments and formatting before PUT.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor and maintainer follow-up for real policy-endpoint proof, release-owned changelog cleanup, and acceptance of the fail-closed policy behavior; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime evidence.

target.title: fix: preserve pond HuJSON policy edits
target.body:
## Summary

- replace the lossy local HuJSON shims with the official `github.com/tailscale/hujson` parser and patcher
- preserve policy comments, field ordering, trailing commas, closing-delimiter comments, and unrelated sections
- request and submit raw policies as `application/hujson`
- fail closed on malformed, duplicate, or wrongly typed policy sections while retaining ETag compare-and-set retries
- share the same parser-backed policy inspection with `doctor`

## Root cause

Pond ACL bootstrap standardized HuJSON into ordinary JSON, decoded it into maps, and serialized the entire policy again. That necessarily discarded comments and formatting and could create a large unrelated diff for a two-row policy update.

## Verification

- `go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestPondACL|TestDoctorPond|TestMaybeBootstrapPondACL|TestApplyLeaseCreateFlagsValidatesBeforePondACLBootstrap' -count=1`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `go vet ./...`
- `node scripts/build-docs-site.mjs`
- exact synced AWS proof: `run_8b3ba22b14c8`, Go 1.26.3 on `t3.xlarge`, focused pond/doctor tests passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local ...`: clean after fixing its closing-comment preservation finding

The mutation path is exercised end to end against an HTTP policy server, including raw HuJSON media types, ETag propagation, retry after HTTP 412, and persistent-race failure. No production tailnet policy was mutated during validation.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/310
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
